title: Ahmedabad、Gujarat — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Ahmedabad、Gujarat的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Ahmedabad是Gujarat的一个城市，人口约7,650,000。A major industrial and commercial hub in Gujarat, known for its Sabarmati Riverfront, textile industry, and Mahatma Gandhi’s ashram.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
